about.label: The Persona
about.title: Digital Craftsman
about.bio: I am a motivated Junior Developer with IT experience in Austria and a strong passion for software development. I recently successfully completed my apprenticeship and was able to further expand my knowledge of modern web technologies. Since childhood, I have been interested in computers and solving technical problems. Now I look forward to developing my career and contributing to practical projects.

projectDetail.processDescription: Documenting the iterative journey from architectural blueprints to production-ready code.
projectDetail.ctaDescription: I'm currently looking for new challenges where I can apply my expertise. Let's talk about how I can contribute to your team.
